guardrails: only manifest-listed approved:true .md/.txt files are indexed
loose files under data/manuals are ignored
retrieval preserves source ID, title, version, chunk ID, snippet, score, and path
section-aware chunks preserve publisher, corpus_version, section_id, section_heading, and source_url
semantic embedding artifacts are generated outside Git
retrieval evaluation set expected IDs must point to approved corpus chunks
selected retriever is a bounded project decision, not a production superiority claim
empty production KB returns safe unavailable result when no approved manifest is present
citation validation rejects non-retrieved source IDs
current_rag_state.next_use: TASK-FAN-13 real Gemini plus RAG end-to-end Fan smoke

guardrails: recommendation_available requires retrieved source evidence
recommendation citations must be among retrieved source IDs
each recommended action must cite a retrieved source_id and chunk_id pair
Gemini output falls back to a deterministic source-grounded action if malformed, unsafe, or uncited
safe_unavailable mode is used when retrieval is unavailable
no RUL, time-to-failure, confidence percentage, root-cause certainty, or confirmed component failure wording
